name: Chat Go
description: Chat GO is a modern and feature-rich real-time chat application built with React Vite and Node.js.

name: Chat Go Backend
description: Chat GO Backend is a real-time messaging API using Node.js, supporting authentication, WebSocket messaging, and media uploads.

name: Booking Calendar
description: The Booking Calendar is a versatile and customizable online booking solution built for Flutter apps.

name: Montra
description: Montra is a smart financial manager app built with Flutter, helping users track expenses, income, budgets, and financial goals with an intuitive UI and interactive charts.

name: Montra Backend
description: Montra Backend is a powerful financial management API built with Node.js and PostgreSQL, supporting secure authentication, transaction tracking, budgeting, and data exports.

name: Uber Eats Clone
description: The Uber Eats clone is a robust food delivery app built with React Native.

name: Music Mix
description: Music Mix is a dynamic and feature-rich music player app crafted for Android devices.

name: GPT Jr
description: GPT Jr is a Flutter app that blends ChatGPTÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂpowered conversations with DALLÃÂÃÂ·E image generation. Featuring voice input, natural replies, and automated CI/CD, it delivers an interactive AI experience on mobile.

name: LinkedIn Post Generator
description: Automates daily LinkedIn posts using Ollama for content generation and GitHub Actions for scheduling, publishing, and archiving.

name: Portfolio Admin Panel!!
description: A private CMS dashboard for managing portfolio projects and certifications directly from the codebase.

name: Pesa Barbaadi
description: Flutter app to split petrol costs with a friend, synced via Firebase and exportable to Excel/PDF/CSV.

name: Pesa Barbaadi Admin Panel
description: A Streamlit-powered admin dashboard for managing users, trips, expenses, settlements, and analytics in the Pesa Barbaadi travel expense tracking ecosystem. Built with Firebase for real-time data management, reporting, and operational oversight.

name: Pizza Striker
description: This is a fun project which I created for my office colleagues where the task is, whenever a employee do something which they are not suppose to do, they get a strike. After 3 strikes, they have to give pizza party to all of the colleagues of the office.

name: Vyra
description: Vyra is a beautifully crafted AI-powered mobile companion designed to make everyday tasks delightful. Combining conversational intelligence, expressive visuals, voice interaction, and real-world awareness, Vyra brings an emotionally engaging assistant directly to your smartphone.

name: Pizza Striker Backend
description: The backend service for a fun, strike-based gamified app for office teams! Employees who goof up get a strike, and once they collect 3 strikes, they owe everyone a pizza party!

name: Vyra Backend
description: FastAPI brain for the Vyra AI companion: swappable local (Ollama) or cloud LLMs and real-time, interruptible voice.
